About Health Adviser

Health Adviser centralizes your medical tracking into one secure dashboard. Upload prescriptions, monitor blood pressure trends, and receive structured health recommendations — all in one place.

Our mission is to empower individuals with accessible, intelligent tools that simplify health management.

Core Features

📊 Blood Pressure Tracking

Log systolic, diastolic, and pulse values with weekly trend comparison.

📁 Prescription Management

Upload and store prescriptions securely for easy access.

⏰ Smart Reminders

Set medication reminders and improve adherence.

🤖 AI Wellness Plans

Receive diet and workout guidance based on BMI and health profile.

Who Is It For?

  • Individuals managing chronic conditions
  • Caregivers supporting loved ones
  • Health-conscious professionals
  • Anyone seeking structured health monitoring

AI-Powered Insights

Our system analyzes BMI, known conditions, and tracked vitals to generate personalized health recommendations.

  • Customized calorie targets
  • Condition-based diet guidance
  • Workout suggestions
  • Risk awareness indicators

Real-World Use Cases

📈 Hypertension Monitoring

Track patterns and identify potential blood pressure risks early.

💊 Medication Adherence

Reduce missed doses with structured reminders.

🥗 Lifestyle Optimization

Improve habits using AI-generated plans.

Product Roadmap

  • Wearable device integration
  • Mobile application launch
  • Advanced analytics dashboard
  • Teleconsultation integration

Security & Privacy

Your medical data is protected with secure authentication and database isolation. Privacy and confidentiality are our priority.

What Users Say

“Health Adviser made tracking my blood pressure effortless. The reminders are incredibly helpful.”

— Priya M., Pune

“The AI wellness suggestions gave me clarity on improving my daily habits.”

— Rahul K., Mumbai

Frequently Asked Questions

Is it free?

Yes, core features are available for free.

Is my data safe?

Your data remains private and secure.

Can I upload unlimited prescriptions?

Yes, there is no limit.
